summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TC Pro Dojo multi-day/multi-time class scheduling feature, Product CRUD, and Shop checkout flow. All 21 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend tests pass - Classes page correctly displays multi-day classes on their respective days, Admin Class Schedule page has working schedule builder with '+ Add another day' functionality, Shop page displays products with Add to Cart, cart drawer, and checkout form with Stripe integration.

issues: Some products show placeholder package icon instead of actual product images - images need to be uploaded via Cloudinary

critical_code_review_comments: Multi-day/multi-time class scheduling working correctly - schedule array [{day, time}] properly stored and rendered
Classes.js daySchedule useMemo correctly builds flat list per day from schedule array
AdminClassSchedule.js handleSubmit sends both legacy fields (day, days, time) AND new schedule array for backward compatibility
Schedule builder UI has '+ Add another day' link to add multiple schedule entries
Public /classes page shows multi-day classes on correct days (e.g., Tuesday @ 7:00 PM | Thursday @ 8:00 PM)
Shop checkout correctly validates items and creates Stripe session with emergentintegrations library
Shipping zone calculation works: QC=$10, Canada=$15, International=$25
Cart drawer shows item count, quantity controls, and subtotal
Checkout form collects all required fields: name, email, phone, shipping address
Admin Products page has full CRUD with Edit/Delete buttons on each product card
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test data: TEST_MultiDay_Class with 3 schedule entries (Mon/Wed/Fri), TEST_Product with sizes. All test data deleted after verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-day/multi-time class scheduling feature fully tested and working. Classes use 'schedule' array field [{day: string, time: string}]. Admin class form has schedule builder with '+ Add another day' link. Shop checkout uses Stripe via emergentintegrations library. All CRUD operations for classes and products working correctly. Test file test_iteration5_multiday_classes.py covers: admin login, public classes API, admin class CRUD with schedule array, product CRUD, admin orders, shop checkout with Stripe, and site settings.

multi_day_class_scheduling.schedule_appears_on_public_page: Class shows on multiple days (e.g., Tuesday AND Thursday) - PASS
multi_day_class_scheduling.admin_schedule_builder_ui: Form has day dropdown, time input, '+ Add another day' link - WORKING

product_crud.admin_products_page: Shows product cards with Edit/Delete buttons - WORKING

shop_checkout.checkout_invalid_product: POST /api/shop/checkout with invalid product returns 400 - PASS
shop_checkout.cart_drawer: Shows items, quantity controls, subtotal - WORKING
shop_checkout.checkout_form: All fields: name, email, phone, address, notes - WORKING
shop_checkout.stripe_redirect: Pay button redirects to Stripe checkout - WORKING

admin_authentication.login_success: POST /api/admin/login with admin/tcprodojo2025 returns token - PASS
admin_authentication.login_invalid: POST /api/admin/login with wrong credentials returns 401 - PASS

classes_page_ui.week_navigation: Prev Week / Next Week buttons - WORKING
classes_page_ui.day_based_layout: Only days with classes shown - WORKING
classes_page_ui.multi_day_display: Same class appears on multiple days with different times - WORKING
